TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Paterungan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Toyohama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 83 buwan, 227 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 200 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 27 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Kebalan 55%, Amis 27%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Paterungan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Paterungan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Paterungan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Paterungan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Paterungan hya' ga Dipit. tay mkyahu' na Paterungan hya' ga Malaloong. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Paterungan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Paterungan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pateruŋan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu tojoħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, keβalan **%, amis~ɕ **%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pateruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na pateruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na pateruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pateruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pateruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa *ipit. taj mkjaħuʔ na pateruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa malalooŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ pateruŋan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ pateruŋan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Paterungan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Toyohama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 83 buwan, 227 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 200 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 27 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Kebalan 55%, Amis 27%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Paterungan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Paterungan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Paterungan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Paterungan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Paterungan hya' ga Dipit. tay mkyahu' na Paterungan hya' ga Malaloong. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Paterungan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Paterungan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pateruŋan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu tojoħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, keβalan **%, amis~ɕ **%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pateruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na pateruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na pateruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pateruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pateruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa *ipit. taj mkjaħuʔ na pateruŋan ħjaʔ ɣa malalooŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ pateruŋan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ pateruŋan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
